name: Goodberry
description: You create 5 magical berries that can restore health in combat. As a bonus action, you or an ally within 5 feet can consume a berry to regain 1d4+1 hit points. All berries must be used within 1 hour or they lose their magic.
effect: Creates 5 goodberries. Each berry heals 1d4+1 HP when consumed as a bonus action (by self or adjacent ally). Unused berries lose potency after 1 hour.
notes: Creates 5 consumable berry items with 1-hour expiry. Each berry consumed as a bonus action heals 1d4+1 HP.
Inventoried berry mechanic (temporary consumables created by a spell) requires engine support — see spell-mechanics-proposals.md.
Each berry satisfies 1 day's sustenance need (D&D 5e).

material_component.focus_provided: Sprig of Mistletoe provides unlimited pollen
